description.en: PROLOG made logic executable. Instead of writing step-by-step procedures, programmers wrote facts and rules, then asked queries that the system solved by unification and backtracking. The language joined theorem proving, natural-language work, and knowledge representation into a practical symbolic AI tool.
description.zh: PROLOG 让逻辑变得可执行。程序员不再只写一步步过程，而是写事实与规则，再提出查询，由系统通过合一和回溯求解。它把定理证明、自然语言处理和知识表示连接成一种实用的符号 AI 工具。

html.en: By the early 1970s, symbolic AI needed languages that could express rules, relations, and search without burying them under procedural code.
html.zh: 到 1970 年代初，符号 AI 需要能表达规则、关系和搜索的语言，而不是把它们埋在过程式代码里。

html.en: A Prolog program is a database of relations. Query evaluation becomes a controlled search through logical consequences.
html.zh: Prolog 程序是关系数据库。查询求值变成对逻辑后果的受控搜索。

html.en: Experts generally treat Prolog as a landmark in logic programming and declarative computation. Its long-term legacy is the durable idea that facts, rules, unification, and backtracking can form an executable reasoning system.
html.zh: 专家通常把 Prolog 视为逻辑程序设计和声明式计算的标志性成果。它的长期影响在于证明事实、规则、合一和回溯可以组成可执行推理系统。

method.en: Unification plus backtracking over Horn clauses
method.zh: Horn 子句上的合一与回溯

material.en: History paper and Prolog heritage archives
material.zh: 历史论文与 Prolog Heritage 档案

demo.en: Facts and rules answer a query

text.en: Base relations such as parent(alice,bob) define the world the program knows.
text.zh: 像 parent(alice,bob) 这样的基本关系定义程序已知世界。

text.en: Rules describe how new relations follow from existing ones.
text.zh: 规则描述新关系如何从已有关系推出。

text.en: When one path fails, Prolog returns to a choice point and tries another proof.
text.zh: 当一条路径失败时，Prolog 回到选择点尝试另一条证明路径。

description.en: Historical account of Prolog; local visuals redraw query resolution rather than copying figures.
description.zh: Prolog 历史叙述；本地图重画查询求解过程，不复制原图。

license.en: Reference link only; local images are redrawn and do not reuse publisher figures.
license.zh: 仅作为参考链接；本地图片为重绘，不复用出版方图形。
